title: October 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 17''' is the 290th (291st in leap years) day of the year. There are 75 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Guy Henry]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Nathan Butler]] is born.
*1979 – [[Star Wars Weekly 86|''Star Wars Weekly'' 86]] released.
*[[1983]] – [[Felicity Jones]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition]]'' released.
*1995 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Erin Kellyman]] is born.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 6|''Dark Times'' 6]] released.
*[[2008]] – "[[Destroy Malevolence|Destroy ''Malevolence'']]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 1|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 1]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in Star Wars]] Part 1'' published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.52]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 3|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 3]] published.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 22|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 22]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase I – Light of the Jedi Omnibus]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Tales from the Death Star]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Meet the Galactic Heroes]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Who's Making That Noise in The Millennium Falcon?!]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
